title: Entrepreneurship development: NACCIMA, ACCI attend Israel – Nigeria ‘i – FAIR’
description: The President, Nigerian Association of Chambers of Commerce, Industry, Mines, and Agriculture (NACCIMA) Saratu Iya Aliyu was represented by ACCI Vice President, Women Development, Mrs. Roseline Nwosu,
html:
The President, Nigerian Association of Chambers of Commerce, Industry, Mines, and Agriculture (NACCIMA) Saratu Iya Aliyu was represented by ACCI Vice President, Women Development, Mrs. Roseline Nwosu, while the Director General, Abuja Chamber of Commerce and Industry (ACCI) represented the Chamber at the grand finale ceremony of the ‘i-FAIR Israel-Nigeria 2020/21’.

The event which took place at the Skills “G” Innovation Center, is an initiative of Israel Embassy in Nigeria, and the office of the Vice President of Nigeria in partnership with Skill “G” Nigeria Ltd, Denovo Israel Ltd, Gregory University Uturu, Tanir Corporation and other organizations eager to see considerable growth in the Nigerian Innovation, Invention, Research and Development ecosystem.

The initiative targets five area of focus which includes; Agriculture and Food Security, Food Technology, Renewable Energy/Environmental management, Medical Devices/Simulation and Social Responsibility/Solutions for Personal responsibilities.

As every invention begins with an idea, i-FAIR is offering aspiring inventors the opportunities to bring their dreams to life and become entrepreneurs.
